title: centaurea × doumerguei
intro: Centaurea × doumerguei, also known as Doumergue's knapweed, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is native to southwestern Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds that provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Centaurea × doumerguei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health issues.
